title: Split PDF - Extract Pages Securely
h1: Split and Extract PDF Pages in Seconds
description: Extract specific pages or split a large PDF into multiple files locally in your browser. Perfect for legal professionals in New York.

sections.title: Why Split PDFs Locally?
sections.content: When dealing with massive legal or corporate documents, extracting a single page shouldn't require uploading a 1GB file. Do it instantly right on your machine.

steps.title: Open Document
steps.description: Load the multi-page PDF you want to split.

steps.title: Select Ranges
steps.description: Pick specific page numbers or visually select pages to extract.

steps.title: Export Zip
steps.description: Download your newly split files organized in a ZIP.

sections.title: The Best Splitter in New York, US-NY
sections.content: Whether you are studying in New York or working on a tight deadline, extracting pages is now instantaneous.

sections.title: Total Page Privacy
sections.content: Splitting confidential employee records? Rest easy knowing our code executes purely in your local environment.

sections.title: Zero-Upload Extraction
sections.content: Grabbing page 14 from a 2000-page PDF takes milliseconds, skipping the excruciating upload step entirely.

faqs.q: How do I extract just one page?
faqs.a: Simply click on the page thumbnail you want and hit Export.

faqs.q: Can I split the PDF in half?
faqs.a: Yes, you can specify custom page ranges like 1-10 and 11-20.

faqs.q: Will the extracted pages lose quality?
faqs.a: No, the splitting process uses binary extraction, preserving 100% of the original quality.

faqs.q: Is my document uploaded when splitting?
faqs.a: Never. The entire 2000-page document stays strictly in your browser.

faqs.q: Is there a limit to how many pages I can split?
faqs.a: No limits! Split as many pages as your computer can handle.
